claude.rootCheckoutRequired: Open the project root checkout to configure Claude.
claude.scopedCheckoutDetail: This workspace syncs only {path}. Scoped Git access never represents the full Project and cannot unlock Claude. Open the canonical root repository or configure its root remote first.
